title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE BARRIO OF CURBA, MUNICIPALITY OF SANTA FE PROVINCE OF LEYTE, TO BARRIO SAN ROQUE

chunks.text:
H. No. 5222 / 53 OG No. 16, 5138 (August 31, 1957)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1696, June 20, 1957 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE BARRIO OF CURBA, MUNICIPALITY OF SANTA FE PROVINCE OF LEYTE, TO BARRIO SAN ROQUE

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the barrio of Curba, Municipality of Santa Fe, Province of Leyte, is changed to barrio San Rogue.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 20, 1957.
